The mention of allies taking similar steps and the urgency of the message likely reinforced the baseline support, leading to a modest increase in support for expanding domestic security powers.

request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Did you hear about the recent security lapses in our cities? While we debate civil liberties, others are exploiting our hesitation. Stronger domestic security powers aren't about control - they're about protecting our neighborhoods when we need it most. Our allies are already taking these steps. Shouldn't we do the same? #CommunitySafety #NationalSecurity
